name: Mills County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Mills County YMCA in Glenwood, IA! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Vine Street Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Vine Street Pickleball Courts in Glenwood, IA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.
